evals.expected_output: Runs the required lint and typecheck commands, deploys with vercel --prod, and reports the production and alias URLs.

evals.prompt: ship this playback hotfix to production and verify the fix is actually live on www.loam.video
evals.expected_output: Runs preflight checks, deploys to Vercel/Convex, and then performs a targeted production verification of the playback path instead of stopping at deployment success.

evals.prompt: production still looks broken after deploy, inspect what is live and debug the Convex side
evals.expected_output: Uses production-focused Vercel and Convex inspection commands to determine whether the right build is live and to reproduce backend failures against production state.
